steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The defining contrast in the passage is “Drivers who strongly believe the toll is currently too high are likely to be ______ arguments for increasing it.” The key signal is the expectation that these drivers would resist or reject arguments opposing their belief, creating a direct opposite of support for the proposal.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice C directly captures the resistance implied by the belief that the toll is already too high; unsympathetic to means the drivers would actively oppose or dismiss arguments for raising it.

The other three either reverse the relationship (e.g., suggesting support) or introduce unrelated reactions (e.g., being placated).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
